testcase.name: testAdminDashboard
testcase.system-out:
11:59:37.394 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.smartcampus.events.DashboardTest]: DashboardTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 11:59:37.533 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.smartcampus.events.SmartEventsApplication for test class com.smartcampus.events.DashboardTest 11:59:37.750 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running . ____ _ __ _ _ /\\ / ___'_ __ _ _(_)_ __ __ _ \ \ \ \ ( ( )\___ | '_ | '_| | '_ \/ _` | \ \ \ \ \\/ ___)| |_)| | | | | || (_| | ) ) ) ) ' |____| .__|_| |_|_| |_\__, | / / / / =========|_|==============|___/=/_/_/_/ :: Spring Boot :: (v3.2.4) 2026-05-01T11:59:38.100+05:30 INFO 23232 --- [Smart Campus Event Management System] [ main] com.smartcampus.events.DashboardTest : Starting DashboardTest using Java 17.0.18 with PID 23232 (started by kusuma in C:\Users\Kusuma\Downloads\smarteventsystem) 2026-05-01T11:59:38.100+05:30 INFO 23232 --- [Smart Campus Event Management System] [ main] com.smartcampus.events.DashboardTest : No active profile set, falling back to 1 default profile: "default" 2026-05-01T11:59:39.216+05:30 INFO 23232 --- [Smart Campus Event Management System] [ main] .s.d.r.c.RepositoryConfigurationDelegate : Bootstrapping Spring Data JPA repositories in DEFAULT mode. 2026-05-01T11:59:39.300+05:30 INFO 23232 --- [Smart Campus Event Management System] [ main] .s.d.r.c.RepositoryConfigurationDelegate : Finished Spring Data repository scanning in 82 ms. Found 7 JPA repository interfaces. 2026-05-01T11:59:40.067+05:30 INFO 23232 --- [Smart Campus Event Management System] [ main] o.hibernate.jpa.internal.util.LogHelper : HHH000204: Processing PersistenceUnitInfo [name: default] 2026-05-01T11:59:40.133+05:30 INFO 23232 --- [Smart Campus Event Management System] [ main] org.hibernate.Version : HHH000412: Hibernate ORM core version 6.4.4.Final 2026-05-01T11:59:40.187+05:30 INFO 23232 --- [Smart Campus Event Management System] [ main] o.h.c.internal.RegionFactoryInitiator : HHH000026: Second-level cache disabled 2026-05-01T11:59:40.550+05:30 INFO 23232 --- [Smart Campus Event Management System] [ main] o.s.o.j.p.SpringPersistenceUnitInfo : No LoadTimeWeaver setup: ignoring JPA class transformer 2026-05-01T11:59:40.588+05:30 INFO 23232 --- [Smart Campus Event Management System] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Starting... 2026-05-01T11:59:40.767+05:30 INFO 23232 --- [Smart Campus Event Management System] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool : HikariPool-1 - Added connection conn0: url=jdbc:h2:mem:smartcampusdb user=SA 2026-05-01T11:59:40.767+05:30 INFO 23232 --- [Smart Campus Event Management System] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Start completed. 2026-05-01T11:59:40.784+05:30 WARN 23232 --- [Smart Campus Event Management System] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.deprecation : HHH90000025: H2Dialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-05-01T11:59:41.667+05:30 INFO 23232 --- [Smart Campus Event Management System] [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) 2026-05-01T11:59:41.717+05:30 INFO 23232 --- [Smart Campus Event Management System] [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-05-01T11:59:42.267+05:30 INFO 23232 --- [Smart Campus Event Management System] [ main] o.s.d.j.r.query.QueryEnhancerFactory : Hibernate is in classpath; If applicable, HQL parser will be used. 2026-05-01T11:59:43.651+05:30 WARN 23232 --- [Smart Campus Event Management System] [ main] JpaBaseConfiguration$JpaWebConfiguration : spring.jpa.open-in-view is enabled by default. Therefore, database queries may be performed during view rendering. Explicitly configure spring.jpa.open-in-view to disable this warning 2026-05-01T11:59:44.821+05:30 INFO 23232 --- [Smart Campus Event Management System] [ main] o.s.b.a.h2.H2ConsoleAutoConfiguration : H2 console available at '/h2-console'. Database available at 'jdbc:h2:mem:smartcampusdb' 2026-05-01T11:59:44.973+05:30 INFO 23232 --- [Smart Campus Event Management System] [ main] o.s.b.t.m.w.SpringBootMockServletContext : Initializing Spring TestDispatcherServlet '' 2026-05-01T11:59:44.973+05:30 INFO 23232 --- [Smart Campus Event Management System] [ main] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Initializing Servlet '' 2026-05-01T11:59:44.981+05:30 INFO 23232 --- [Smart Campus Event Management System] [ main] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Completed initialization in 8 ms 2026-05-01T11:59:45.033+05:30 INFO 23232 --- [Smart Campus Event Management System] [ main] com.smartcampus.events.DashboardTest : Started DashboardTest in 7.3 seconds (process running for 8.399) 2026-05-01T11:59:45.433+05:30 INFO 23232 --- [Smart Campus Event Management System] [ main] c.s.events.config.DataInitializer : Default admin created: admin@campus.edu / admin123 2026-05-01T11:59:45.517+05:30 INFO 23232 --- [Smart Campus Event Management System] [ main] c.s.events.config.DataInitializer : Demo student created: student@campus.edu / student123 2026-05-01T11:59:45.517+05:30 INFO 23232 --- [Smart Campus Event Management System] [ main] c.s.events.config.DataInitializer : Sample events created successfully. MockHttpServletRequest: HTTP Method = GET Request URI = /admin/dashboard Parameters = {} Headers = [] Body = null Session Attrs = {org.springframework.security.web.csrf.HttpSessionCsrfTokenRepository.CSRF_TOKEN=org.springframework.security.web.csrf.DefaultCsrfToken@1459ffe4, SPRING_SECURITY_CONTEXT=SecurityContextImpl [Authentication=UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken [Principal=org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.User [Username=admin@campus.edu, Password=[PROTECTED], Enabled=true, AccountNonExpired=true, CredentialsNonExpired=true, AccountNonLocked=true, Granted Authorities=[ROLE_ADMIN]], Credentials=[PROTECTED], Authenticated=true, Details=null, Granted Authorities=[ROLE_ADMIN]]]} Handler: Type = com.smartcampus.events.controller.AdminController Method = com.smartcampus.events.controller.AdminController#dashboard(UserDetails, Model) Async: Async started = false Async result = null Resolved Exception: Type = null ModelAndView: View name = admin/dashboard View = null Attribute = admin value = User(id=1, name=System Admin, email=admin@campus.edu, username=admin, password=$2a$10$7XFGZ8osJdPX.YUXRI6Zt.GXHCjwCKJQzRa0oub0pPN5c94xjxWwC, role=ADMIN, department=CSE, phone=9999999999, createdAt=2026-05-01T11:59:45.383759) errors = [] Attribute = totalEvents value = 5 Attribute = totalRegistrations value = 0 Attribute = announcements value = [] Attribute = recentEvents value = [Event(id=4, title=Robotics Design Challenge, description=Teams design and build autonomous robots to complete obstacle courses. Cash prizes for top 3 teams., department=MECH, eventType=Competition, venue=Mechanical Workshop, timing=null, startDate=2026-05-21, endDate=2026-05-22, lastDateToApply=2026-05-16, seatLimit=80, minTeamSize=1, maxTeamSize=1, registeredCount=0, createdAt=2026-05-01T11:59:45.517160, updatedAt=null), Event(id=1, title=National CodeSprint 2026, description=A 48-hour competitive programming marathon open to all engineering students. Solve algorithmic challenges and win prizes., department=CSE, eventType=Technical, venue=CS Lab Block A, timing=null, startDate=2026-05-11, endDate=2026-05-13, lastDateToApply=2026-05-08, seatLimit=150, minTeamSize=1, maxTeamSize=1, registeredCount=0, createdAt=2026-05-01T11:59:45.517160, updatedAt=null), Event(id=2, title=IoT & Embedded Systems Workshop, description=Hands-on workshop on building IoT devices using Raspberry Pi and Arduino with real-world sensor integration., department=ECE, eventType=Workshop, venue=ECE Innovation Hub, timing=null, startDate=2026-05-06, endDate=2026-05-07, lastDateToApply=2026-05-04, seatLimit=60, minTeamSize=1, maxTeamSize=1, registeredCount=0, createdAt=2026-05-01T11:59:45.517160, updatedAt=null), Event(id=3, title=Green Energy Symposium, description=A seminar on renewable energy trends, solar panel tech, and sustainable engineering practices., department=EEE, eventType=Seminar, venue=Seminar Hall 2, timing=null, startDate=2026-04-29, endDate=2026-05-02, lastDateToApply=2026-04-26, seatLimit=200, minTeamSize=1, maxTeamSize=1, registeredCount=0, createdAt=2026-05-01T11:59:45.517160, updatedAt=null), Event(id=5, title=AI in Healthcare – Guest Lecture, description=Industry experts discuss the role of machine learning and AI models in diagnostics, imaging, and patient care., department=IT, eventType=Guest Lecture, venue=Auditorium, timing=null, startDate=2026-04-21, endDate=2026-04-21, lastDateToApply=2026-04-19, seatLimit=300, minTeamSize=1, maxTeamSize=1, registeredCount=0, createdAt=2026-05-01T11:59:45.517160, updatedAt=null)] FlashMap: Attributes = null MockHttpServletResponse: Status = 200 Error message = null Headers = [Vary:"Origin", "Access-Control-Request-Method", must-revalidate", Pragma:"no-cache", Expires:"0", X-Frame-Options:"SAMEORIGIN"] Content type = text/html;charset=UTF-8 Body = Admin Dashboard | Smart Campus
